title: TripSpecification
description: A description of the desired journey used as input to search and price transport options.

numTravelers.description: Number of travelers for whom to price options

modes.description: Preferred transport modes for the trip

textSearch.description: Free-text search query expressing what the traveler is looking for

filters.description: JSONPath filter criteria applied to the search results

spatial.description: Geographic constraints on the search area

provider.description: Identifier of a specific provider to search within
